title: Diabetic-Friendly Garlic Chicken Liver Croissant Crumble
description: A festive Croatian dish featuring a diabetic-friendly crumbly preparation of chicken liver seasoned with garlic and herbs.

ingredients.name: chicken liver
ingredients.notes: ensure it is diabetic-friendly, consult healthcare provider for preparation instructions

ingredients.name: diabetic-friendly flour or almond meal
ingredients.notes: ensure it is gluten-free if required

ingredients.name: evaporated milk (optional for binding)
ingredients.notes: reduce to 1 tablespoon if not diabetic-friendly

instructions: Combine minced garlic and herbs in a mixing bowl.
Add softened butter, gradually incorporating until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
Gently fold in evaporated milk (if using) and mix well. Ensure it is crumbly but holds together slightly.
Shape into small croissant-like shapes or balls.
Refrigerate for 30 minutes to firm up.
Bake at 180°C (356°F) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and crisp.
